name: Spicy Cranberry Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring cranberries, honey and 1/2 cup of water to a boil in a saucepan.
Cover and simmer for 10 minutes, then uncover and simmer for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
2. Quarter unpeeled orange and chop it finely in a food processor. Add to simmering cranberry mixture with the remaining 1/2 cup of water and spices.
Stir well and simmer for an additional 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Chill before serving.
